heading: Finality of decisions
label: 8510 Finality of decisions
text: Decisions by the Secretary under this subchapter shall not be reviewable administratively by any other officer of the United States.
notes: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–40section 5210 of this titlesubstituted “Secretary” for “Administrator”.Pub. L. 102–83
